products.title: Belrose Pleated Gown
products.body_html:
"When the lights glow, so should you."

Effortlessly merging minimalism with sculptural elegance, this long dress is a masterpiece in textured design. Crafted in a soft crushed satin fabric, its intricate ruched detailing radiates from the waist, creating a flattering drape effect that elongates the silhouette. The concealed button-down front adds a clean, structured touch, while the detachable fabric belt cinches the waist for a custom fit, offering versatile styling. Its mandarin collar and half sleeves lend a modern, refined appeal, making it perfect for day-to-night transitions. This piece becomes an effortless statement for resort brunches, gallery openings, or chic evening plans.

  • Fabric – Textured Satin
  • Model is wearing – Size XS
  • This SKU consists of a Dress with a matching belt
  • Dress length – 56 inches
  • Sleeve length – 16 inches (approx.)
  • Neckline – Mandarin Collar
  • Closure – Front button placket
  • Lining - Unlined
  • We use flash photography for clear images, but slight color differences may occur due to indoor/outdoor lighting or screen settings.

products.title: Crush Satin Waldorf Gown
products.body_html:
"Unveil a look that blends power, poise, and ease."

Exuding understated luxury with a modern edge, this dress redefines contemporary elegance with its meticulously draped silhouette cascading gracefully to the hem. The soft olive green hue gives it a sophisticated, earthy charm, while the gathered side detailing creates a flattering cinch at the waist. The collared neckline and button-down front introduce a refined, structured appeal, balanced by the fluidity. Perfect for intimate gatherings, luxe evening dinners, or destination soirées, this piece promises to move with quiet drama, making every step a statement.

products.title: Champagne Spacewalk Drape Dress
products.body_html:
Featuring a sophisticated metallic sheen that catches the light beautifully. The surplice V-neckline and voluminous dolman sleeves create a relaxed yet refined silhouette, perfect for any upscale evening.

Artfully constructed with a gathered wrap-style skirt, the dress offers a flattering, tapered fit that elegantly accentuates the waist. The lightweight, textured fabric provides a graceful flow, ensuring you stay comfortable while looking stunning from every angle. Finished with a subtle asymmetrical hemline, this piece is a modern take on classic Grecian-inspired glamour.

  • Color Details: A luminous Champagne Gold.
  • Fabric: lightweight metallic with sequin blend, offering a high-stretch
  • Style Type: A Grecian-inspired draped midi dress featuring a surplice V-neckline, dolman sleeves, and an asymmetrical wrap skirt.
  • Closure: center-back zipper for a seamless, tailored fit through the bodice and hips.


We use flash photography for clear images, but slight color differences may occur due to indoor/outdoor lighting or screen settings

products.title: Dusty Diva Embroidered Kaftan
products.body_html:
This stunning Dusty Rose Kaftan is the epitome of relaxed elegance, perfect for special occasions or sophisticated casual wear. Crafted from a luxurious, smooth satin fabric, the garment drapes beautifully, offering a flowing, voluminous silhouette that flatters all body types. The design features a flattering V-neckline accented with intricate gold-toned beading and sequin embroidery that extends along the edges of the 'V'. It features a gathered drape cinched at the waist with a hand-embroidered jewel brooch detail that adds a touch of couture-like glamour. The sleeves are a short, wide, batwing style and also feature small, scattered gold-toned embellishments on the sleeves. The kaftan is a long, ankle-grazing length and is designed to flow freely at the back, as seen in the back view, maintaining its graceful, uncinched drape. products.body_html:
This vibrant lime-green tunic dress is a playful statement piece defined by its comfortable, oversized silhouette, short sleeves, and unique elasticized hem that creates a subtle bubble shape. The garment is richly decorated with a fun watermelon theme: large, sparkling pink and maroon sequin slices are prominently featured on the front patch pockets and scattered across the back, accented by small black 'seed' dots. The deep V-notch neckline adds a modern touch, making this comfortable, eye-catching dress perfect for summer wear, easily styled alone or over leggings for a bold, cheerful look.

products.title: NORWAY COAT-WHITE CHECK
products.body_html:
This sophisticated piece is a contemporary take on the classic trench, presented in a crisp, timeless black and white houndstooth check pattern. The garment is structured as a double-breasted coat-dress, featuring a sharp, notched lapel collar and a fitted bodice with a defined waist. The most striking detail is the dramatic asymmetrical hemline, which flares out from the fitted waist: it drops to a standard mid-thigh length in the back and on one side, while the opposite side extends into a sweeping, floor-grazing drape for a high-fashion, cascading effect

Colour Details: Monochromatic black and white houndstooth check.
Fabric: Structured, mid-weight woven fabric .
Style Type: Tailored Double-Breasted Asymmetrical Coat-Dress .
Closure: Double-Breasted Buttons.

Puff-shouldered three-quarter sleeves add a touch of romance, while a playful ruffle tier finishes the hemline, enhancing the light, summery feel. Crafted from a comfortable, lightweight fabric, this babydoll-style dress is ideal for strolling through markets or enjoying a resort lunch.

    Colour Details: Teal/Aqua Blue base with Mustard Yellow/Gold floral
    Fabric: Lightweight, printed woven fabric ( cotton ) with elastic smocking

products.body_html:
